description_long: This is an adult woman with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly extended outward. She is wearing a sleeveless, form-fitting long dress that reaches her ankles, featuring a deep V-neckline. Her footwear consists of high-heeled shoes, adding to her overall height and formal appearance. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, with no visible accessories or carried items. The facial features are neutral, and the skin tone is light. The overall look suggests she is dressed for a formal or semi-formal urban occasion.
description: A standing adult woman in a sleeveless, long dress with high heels and hair in a bun, exuding a formal and elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep V-neckline of the dress, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the bun hairstyle, and the length and fit of the dress.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, the bun hairstyle, and the alignment of the legs and heels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the dress's fit along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless long formal dress with a deep V-neckline
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: hair styled in a neat bun
